title: Namaz-e-Janaza
intro: Namaz-e-Janaza (Funeral Prayer) is Fardh Kifayah — obligatory upon the Muslim community. If enough Muslims perform it, the obligation is lifted from the rest. If no one performs it, the entire community is sinful. It has no ruku (bowing) or sujood (prostration). It consists of 4 takbeers while standing.
virtue: The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever attends a funeral until the prayer is offered will receive one qirat (of reward), and whoever attends until the burial is done will receive two qirats. The smaller qirat is like Mount Uhud.' (Bukhari 1325)
conditions: Be in a state of purity (wudu is required)
The body (janazah) must be present in front
The imam stands at the head of the deceased (for men) or at the middle (for women)
No azan or iqamah for janaza prayer
No ruku or sujood — only standing (qiyam)

steps.name: Niyyah — Intention
steps.desc: Make intention in your heart: 'I intend to pray Namaz-e-Janaza for this deceased, 4 takbeers, for the sake of Allah, following this imam.' The deceased's name or gender does not need to be specified aloud.

steps.name: First Takbeer — Takbeer-e-Tahrima
steps.desc: Raise hands to ears (as in regular prayer) and say Allahu Akbar. Fold hands below chest. This is the opening takbeer that makes the prayer binding.

steps.name: Thana (After First Takbeer)
steps.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ وَجَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
steps.transliteration: Subhaanaka Allaahumma wa bihamdika wa tabaarakasmuka wa ta'aalaa jadduka wa jalla thanaa'uka wa laa ilaaha ghayruk
steps.translation: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise. Blessed is Your name and exalted is Your majesty, and glorified is Your praise, and there is none worthy of worship except You
steps.urdu: اے اللہ! تو پاک ہے اور تیری تعریف ہے، تیرا نام بابرکت ہے، تیری شان بلند ہے، تیری تعریف جلیل ہے، اور تیرے سوا کوئی معبود نہیں
steps.desc: Read silently after the first Takbeer. This is the opening praise — only in Janaza prayer does it include 'wa jalla thanaa'uka.'

steps.name: Second Takbeer
steps.desc: Say Allahu Akbar (hands are NOT raised — only raised for the first takbeer in Hanafi). After this, recite Durood Ibrahim.

steps.name: Durood Ibrahim (After Second Takbeer)
steps.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ ۝ اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
steps.transliteration: Allaahumma salli 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa aali Muhammad kamaa sallayta 'alaa Ibraaheema wa 'alaa aali Ibraaheem innaka Hameedun Majeed. Allaahumma baarik 'alaa Muhammadin wa 'alaa aali Muhammad kamaa baarakta 'alaa Ibraaheema wa 'alaa aali Ibraaheem innaka Hameedun Majeed
steps.translation: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You sent blessings upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim, truly You are Praiseworthy and Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You blessed Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim, truly You are Praiseworthy and Glorious
steps.urdu: اے اللہ! محمد ﷺ اور آل محمد پر رحمت نازل فرما جیسا تو نے ابراہیم اور آل ابراہیم پر رحمت نازل فرمائی، بے شک تو قابل تعریف اور بزرگی والا ہے
steps.desc: Recite Durood Ibrahim silently after the second takbeer. This is wajib (obligatory) in the janaza prayer.

steps.name: Third Takbeer
steps.desc: Say Allahu Akbar. After this comes the most important part — the dua for the deceased. This is the heart of Janaza prayer.

steps.name: Dua for the Deceased (After Third Takbeer)
steps.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِحَيِّنَا وَمَيِّتِنَا، وَشَاهِدِنَا وَغَائِبِنَا، وَصَغِيرِنَا وَكَبِيرِنَا، وَذَكَرِنَا وَأُنْثَانَا، اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ أَحْيَيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَأَحْيِهِ عَلَى الْإِسْلَامِ، وَمَنْ تَوَفَّيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَتَوَفَّهُ عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ
steps.transliteration: Allaahummaghfir lihayyinaa wa mayyitinaa, wa shaahidinaa wa ghaa'ibinaa, wa sagheerinaa wa kabeerinaa, wa thakarinaa wa unthaanaa. Allaahumma man ahyaytahu minnaa fa ahyihi 'alal-islaam, wa man tawaffaytahu minnaa fa tawaffahu 'alal-eemaan
steps.translation: O Allah, forgive our living and our dead, those present and those absent, our young and our old, our males and our females. O Allah, whoever among us You keep alive, let him live upon Islam, and whoever among us You take in death, let him die upon faith
steps.urdu: اے اللہ! ہمارے زندوں اور مردوں، حاضرین اور غائبین، چھوٹوں اور بڑوں، مردوں اور عورتوں کو معاف فرما۔ اے اللہ! جسے زندہ رکھے اسے اسلام پر زندہ رکھ اور جسے وفات دے اسے ایمان پر وفات دے
steps.desc: This is the main dua of Janaza prayer — recited silently after the third takbeer. This dua is from the Sunnah (Abu Dawud 3201, Tirmidhi 1024). It covers all Muslims — living and dead.

steps.name: Extended Dua for the Deceased (Optional but Recommended)
steps.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ وَعَافِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ، وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ، وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ، وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ، وَنَقِّهِ مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الْأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ، وَأَبْدِلْهُ دَارًا خَيْرًا مِنْ دَارِهِ، وَأَهْلًا خَيْرًا مِنْ أَهْلِهِ، وَزَوْجًا خَيْرًا مِنْ زَوْجِهِ، وَأَدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعِذْهُ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ
steps.transliteration: Allaahummaghfir lahu warhamhu wa 'aafihi wa'fu 'anhu, wa akrim nuzulahu, wa wassi' mudkhalahu, waghsilhu bil-maa'i wath-thalji wal-barad, wa naqqihi minal-khathaayaa kamaa naqqaytath-thawbal-abyada minad-danas, wa abdilhu daaran khayran min daarihi, wa ahlan khayran min ahlihi, wa zawjan khayran min zawjihi, wa adkhilhul-jannata wa a'ithhu min 'adhaabil-qabri wa 'adhaabinnaar
steps.translation: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him, grant him well-being and pardon him, honor his entrance, widen his entry, wash him with water, snow and hail. Purify him of sins as a white garment is purified of filth. Give him a better home than his home, a better family than his family, a better spouse than his spouse. Admit him to Paradise and protect him from the punishment of the grave and punishment of the Fire
steps.urdu: اے اللہ! اسے معاف فرما، اس پر رحم فرما، اسے عافیت دے، اسے معاف کر، اس کی ضیافت کو باعزت بنا، اس کے داخلے کو کشادہ کر، اسے پانی، برف اور اولوں سے دھو، اسے گناہوں سے ایسے پاک کر جیسے سفید کپڑے کو میل سے پاک کیا جاتا ہے، اسے بہتر گھر، بہتر اہل اور بہتر ساتھی دے اور جنت میں داخل کر اور قبر کے عذاب اور آگ کے عذاب سے بچا
steps.desc: This comprehensive dua is from Sahih Muslim (963). Recite it for adult males (change pronouns for females: 'lahaa' instead of 'lahu'). For children, use the special dua below.

steps.name: Dua for a Deceased Child
steps.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ فَرَطًا لِأَبَوَيْهِ وَسَلَفًا وَذُخْرًا وَعِظَةً وَاعْتِبَارًا وَشَفِيعًا، وَثَقِّلْ بِهِ مَوَازِينَهُمَا وَأَفْرِغِ الصَّبْرَ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمَا
steps.transliteration: Allaahumma aj'alhu faratan li-abawayki wa salafan wa thukhran wa 'izatan wa'tibaaran wa shafee'an, wa thaqqil bihi mawazeenahumaa wa afrigh as-sabra 'alaa quloobihimaa
steps.translation: O Allah, make him a forerunner for his parents, an investment for them, a treasure, a reminder, a lesson, and an intercessor. Weigh down their scales with him, and pour patience upon their hearts
steps.urdu: اے اللہ! اسے اس کے والدین کے لیے آگے بھیجا گیا ذخیرہ بنا، نیکیوں کا آگے جانے والا، ان کے لیے سرمایہ، عبرت اور شفاعت کرنے والا۔ ان کے میزانوں کو اس سے بھاری کر اور ان کے دلوں پر صبر انڈیل دے
steps.desc: This special dua is recited for young children who have passed away, instead of the full dua above.

steps.name: Fourth (Final) Takbeer
steps.desc: Say the fourth and final Allahu Akbar. Some scholars say to add a brief dua here. The prayer is now ready to be ended with salam.

steps.name: Salam — Ending the Prayer
steps.translation: Peace be upon you and the mercy of Allah
steps.urdu: تم پر سلامتی ہو اور اللہ کی رحمت
steps.desc: Turn head to the RIGHT saying salam, then to the LEFT saying salam. This ends the Janaza prayer. The body is then carried for burial.

items.title: When Placing in the Grave
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَعَلَى مِلَّةِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ
items.translation: In the name of Allah and upon the way of the Messenger of Allah
items.urdu: اللہ کے نام سے اور اللہ کے رسول کے طریقے پر

items.title: After Burial — Du'a for the Deceased
items.translation: O Allah, forgive him. O Allah, make him firm
items.urdu: اے اللہ! اسے معاف فرما۔ اے اللہ! اسے ثابت قدم رکھ
items.desc: After burial, the Prophet ﷺ would stand and say: 'Seek forgiveness for your brother, and ask for firmness for him, for he is now being questioned.'

important_notes: In Hanafi madhab, hands are only raised at the FIRST takbeer. In Shafi'i, hands are raised at each takbeer.
The imam stands at the head of the deceased male, at the middle for female.
If the body is not present, the prayer is not valid (this is Janaza in absentia — a separate ruling).
There is no azan, iqamah, or loud recitation in Janaza prayer.
Women can perform Janaza prayer but are generally not encouraged to go to the cemetery.
If you arrive late and the imam has said some takbeers, join and follow — make up the missed takbeers after salam.
It is sunnah to participate in the carrying of the janazah — walk with it to the grave.
The Prophet ﷺ said to walk briskly with the janazah — faster than a normal walk.
